recent_examples.quote: The only thing I would say is that if you're not on the line, I'm hanging up. K. I gotcha. I'll let him know.
Oh, 05:30 is better. Because I work nights, so I'll probably be asleep most of the day.
Just to let you know, we'll give you a call, couple hours beforehand, and we'll text you just to make sure that time still works.
I'll send you that text right now, and then I will also text you your appointment details just so you can add it to your calendar as well. Does that sound good?
Tomorrow would be fine. Yeah. I'll I'll I'll be here.

If you can just do a phone call, that'll be fine. What number would they be calling me from? Because I have a screening service on my phone number, and it usually blocks numbers. See, that's why your number didn't really comes through. I happen to, you know, see it where it showe

Yeah. We can definitely just shoot it for next week then. Again, that's just a preliminary call to make sure all the numbers make sense and just kinda give you a full idea of what it would look like for this home.
We can do anytime between, 10AM and 7PM.
